publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2022-04-27 18:24:16 UTC.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

origination.label: creator
origination.corpname: Cornell University. Office of the Dean of Students

did.physdesc: Records, reports, meeting minutes, time cards
did.abstract: Administrative and organization records; files of the Student Finance Commission including minutes, Selection Committee information, information on student organizations, financial statements, Student Activities Groups accounts, Travel Committee requests, Student Government reports, and time cards. Also records of the Graduate Coordinating Commission. Also, files on the Small Living Unit Council, head residents of dormitories (including head residents' manuals), the Intersession Program on Women (1968-1969), the Housing and Dining Commission, and housing issues on campus.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

defitem.label: EAD encoding:
defitem.item: Ann Hubert, July 2003Peter Martinez, Dec. 10, 2003Evan Earle, February 2013

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Administrative and organization records; records of the Graduate Coordinating Commission; and files of the Student Finance Commission including minutes, Selection Committee information, information on student organizations, financial statements, Student Activities Groups accounts, Travel Committee requests, Student Government reports, and time cards. Also, files on the Small Living Unit Council, head residents of dormitories (including head residents' manuals), the Intersession Program on Women (1968-1969), the Housing and Dining Commission, and housing issues on campus.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Dean of Students' Office records and add the appropriate call number, either #37-1-855, #37-1-977, #37-1-1570, or #37-1-1553. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

accessrestrict.head: Access Restrictions:
accessrestrict.p: Access restricted to the permission of the office of origin.
